zh.lifeSummary: 當Rebecca Thompson於1651年1月26日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文時，她的父親John Thompson37歲，母親Dorothy33歲。她於1669年2月3日與Daniel Thomas在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1730年之後在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rebecca Thompson于1651年1月26日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文时，她的父亲John Thompson37岁，母亲Dorothy33岁。她于1669年2月3日与Daniel Thomas在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1730年之后在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂。

nameMeanings.name: Thompson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me) (see Thom ) + -son ‘son of Tom’. Thomson is usually the Scottish form, that with the intrusive -p- being English. Both forms are common in Ireland. The surname Thompson is also very common among African Americans.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Thomsen and of its Swedish cognate Thomsson. Compare Thomson .

variants.name: Thomson
meanings: Scottish, English and northern Irish: variant of   Thompson  .
Scottish: sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic McThomas; see McTavish , McComish .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Thomsen  . Compare   Thompson  .

variants.name: Thom
meanings: Scottish and English: from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me), a pet form of Thomas . In Scotland, Thom is also an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Thom, see McComb .
German: from the personal name Thom, a pet form of Thomas . This surname is also found in France.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 譚, see   Tan   1.

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

historicEvents.description: New Haven County was created on 10 May 1666, and was named for an English port town called Newhaven, London, England
The city served as co-capital of Connecticut from 1701 until 1873
New Haven is the home of Yale University. A  The city served as co-capital of Connecticut from 1701 until 1873, when sole governance was transferred to the more centrally located city of Hartford.

en.lifeSummary: When Rebecca Thompson was born on 26 January 1651, in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Thompson, was 37 and her mother, Dorothy, was 33. She married Daniel Thomas on 3 February 1669, in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1730, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rebecca Thompson est née le 26 janvier 1651, à New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Thompson, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Dorothy, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Daniel Thomas le 3 février 1669, à New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1730, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Thompson è nata il il 26 gennaio 1651 nel New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Thompson, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Dorothy, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Daniel Thomas il 3 febbraio 1669, nel New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1730, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rebecca Thompsonが1651年1月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンで生まれた時，父John Thompsonは37歳，母Dorothyは33歳であった。1669年2月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンでDaniel Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1730年以後にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rebecca Thompson(이)가 1651년 1월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Thompson(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1669년 2월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에서 Daniel Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1730년 이후 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Thompson nasceu em 26 de janeiro de 1651, em New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Thompson, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Daniel Thomas em 3 de fevereiro de 1669, em New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1730, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rebecca Thompson родилась 26 января 1651 г. в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Thompson было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Daniel Thomas 3 февраля 1669 г. в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1730 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rebecca Thompson nació el 26 de enero de 1651, en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Thompson, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Dorothy, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Daniel Thomas el 3 de febrero de 1669, en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1730, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
